AppSettings.title: Application Settings
AppSettings.description: Global settings for prices, scrap, and economy items

rawPrices.description: Prices per steel grade. Keys are sanitized grade names.

customGrades.description: List of custom steel grades added by admin

remnantPricing.description: Pricing types for remnants per grade and profile

economyItems.description: List of economy items for calculations

/settings/prices.description: Single document holding all global application settings
